hero.subtitle: The ultimate tactical advantage for the modern hooper. Find premium courts near you, track every movement with GPS precision, and dominate the leaderboard with elite analytics.

items.title: FIND YOUR COURT
items.body: Real-time court scouting. See how many players are currently on court and get live condition reports.

items.title: GPS GAME TRACKER
items.body: Automatic playtime logging and movement heatmaps. Know exactly where you dominate on the floor.

items.title: ELITE STATS
items.body: Professional-grade analytics. Track FG%, speed metrics, and verticality in every pickup game.

stats.title: MASTER YOUR
stats.desc: Don't just play—analyze. Our deep-learning algorithm breaks down your movement patterns, shot efficiency, and fatigue levels to give you a pro-ready profile.

cta.title: UNLEASH YOUR POTENTIAL
cta.subtitle: Join over 50,000 hoopers who have leveled up their game with 1OF1. The next court is waiting for you.

socialHub.title: SOCIAL HUB
socialHub.body: Stay connected. Chat with your crew, share highlights on social media, and scout the competition in real-time.

pickups.title: PICKUPS & EVENTS
pickups.body: Host private runs or join public events. Get matched with players at your skill level for the best competition.

clan.title: CONQUER THE COURT
clan.body: Introduce your squad to the global stage. Win matches at your local park to claim the title of

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By creating an account and using 1of1, you accept these terms.

sections.heading: Use of the app
sections.body: 1of1 helps you find courts and log games. You are responsible for the information you submit (courts, reviews, handle, name) and for playing safely: the app does not monitor or guarantee the condition of courts.

sections.heading: Content and conduct
sections.body: You are responsible for the content you post, including court reviews and messages sent in pickup chats. Offensive content, spam, harassment, or impersonation is not allowed. You can report inappropriate content or users from the app and block other users. We review reports and may remove content or suspend accounts that violate these rules. We do not tolerate abusive content.

sections.heading: Location and background
sections.body: Game detection uses your location, including in the background if you authorize it. You can disable it anytime from Settings → Privacy or from system permissions.

sections.heading: Health data
sections.body: Health metrics are informational and do not constitute medical advice.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: The app is provided "as is". We are not liable for injuries, losses, or damages arising from the use of the app or from attending courts.

sections.heading: Account deletion
sections.body: You can delete your account anytime from Settings → Delete Account.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where the app operates. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of that jurisdiction, without prejudice to consumer protection rights in your country of residence.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters. This policy describes how 1of1 collects, uses, and protects your information.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: Email and name used to create your account. Public handle and display name in the app. Location (GPS) to detect games and nearby courts, including in the background if you authorize it. Activity data: game time, movement, and performance metrics. Messages in pickup chats (stored server-side only). Device information (model, OS, notification token).

sections.heading: How we use your data
sections.body: To operate and improve the app: matchmaking, statistics, push notifications, and automatic game detection. To personalize your experience and show relevant content.

sections.heading: Data sharing
sections.body: Your handle and display name are visible to other users. Your exact location is never shared publicly; it is only used for internal calculations. We do not sell your data to third parties.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: Your data is transmitted and stored securely. However, no method of Internet transmission is 100% secure.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You can access, correct, or delete your data from Settings → Account. You can disable location permissions anytime from system settings.

sections.heading: Children
sections.body: The app is not directed at children under 13.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
sections.body: If we make significant changes, we will notify you within the app.
